item.title: The Duggar Family Faces Another Scandal
item.description: A brief look at the latest controversy involving the Duggar family, as covered by True Crime Recaps.

item.title: Danny Masterson's Legal Battle Explained
item.description: A look at Danny Masterson’s legal battle and the case that led to a 30-year sentence.

media:content.media:description: A look at Danny Masterson’s legal battle and the case that led to a 30-year sentence.
